description.value: Aura strong universal; CL 12th; Slot none; Price 75 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This item is merely a burned out, dull gray ioun stone with a continual flame spell cast upon it. It retains the ability to float and orbit, and allows the bearer to carry light and still have his hands free. It may be in any crystalline shape common to ioun stones (ellipsoid, prism, sphere, and so on). CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Wondrous Item, continual flame; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 62 gp, 5 sp
